debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
v : Vector α n
idx : Fin n
elt : α
f : (idx : ℕ) → α → idx < n → β
⊢ (v.set (↑idx) elt ⋯).mapFinIdx f = (v.mapFinIdx f).set (↑idx) (f (↑idx) elt ⋯) ⋯

failed_attempts:
rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      apply Subtype.eq
      simp only
      induction l generalizing idx f with
      | nil => exact idx.elim0
      | cons x xs ih =>
        cases idx using Fin.cases with
        | zero => simp [List.set, List.mapFinIdx_cons]
        | succ i =>
          simp [List.set, List.mapFinIdx_cons]
          exact ih (idx := i)

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [h, mapFinIdx_get]

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp only [mapFinIdx_length, List.length_set]
      · intro i _ _
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : i = idx
        · subst h; simp
        · simp [h, mapFinIdx_get]

apply Vector.eq
      simp only [Vector.mapFinIdx, Vector.set]
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length]
      · intro i h1 h2
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : i = idx.1
        · subst h
          simp [List.get_set_eq]
        · rw [List.get_set_ne _ _ h, List.get_set_ne _ _ h, mapFinIdx_get]
          rfl

ext i
      simp [Vector.get_set_eq, mapFinIdx_get]
      split_ifs <;> simp_all

cases v
      simp only [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx]
      congr
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [List.length_mapFinIdx, List.length_set]
      · intro i h
        rw [mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set]
        split
        · next h => rw [List.get_set]; simp [h]; congr; exact h.symm
        · next h => rw [List.get_set]; simp [h]; rw [mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      dsimp
      by_cases h : i = idx <;> simp_all [mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set_eq, List.get_set_ne]

induction n generalizing v with
      | zero => exact idx.elim0
      | succ n ih =>
        match v with
        | ⟨[], _⟩ => contradiction
        | ⟨_ :: _, _⟩ =>
          cases idx using Fin.cases with
          | zero => simp [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx, List.set, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.val_zero]
          | succ i =>
            simp [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx, List.set, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.val_succ]
            rw [ih]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [mapFinIdx_get, h]

apply Vector.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length]
      · intro i _ _
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : i = idx
        · subst h; simp [List.get_set_eq]
        · have h' : i.1 ≠ idx.1 := fun he => h (Fin.eq_of_val_eq he)
          simp [List.get_set_ne _ _ _ h', mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx <;> simp [h]

rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      apply Subtype.eq
      simp only [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx]
      induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => exact idx.elim0
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        match idx with
        | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons]
        | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩ =>
          simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons]
          congr
          exact IH (idx := ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩)

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [h, mapFinIdx_get]

cases v
      apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length]
      · intro i _ _
        simp [mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set]
        split <;> simp_all

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp
      · simp [h]

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length, List.length_set, v.2]
      · intro i _ _
        simp only [mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set]
        split
        · rename_i h
          have : i = idx := Fin.eq_of_val_eq h
          subst this
          rfl
        · rfl

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp only [List.length_mapFinIdx, List.length_set]
      · intro i h1 h2
        rw [List.length_mapFinIdx] at h1
        by_cases h : i = idx
        · subst h
          rw [List.get_set_eq, mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set_eq]
        · rw [List.get_set_ne _ _ _ (Ne.symm h), mapFinIdx_get, List.get_set_ne _ _ _ (Ne.symm h), mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h; simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [mapFinIdx_get, h]

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length]
      · intro i h1 h2
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : i = idx.1
        · subst h; simp
        · simp [List.get_set_ne _ _ _ h, mapFinIdx_get]

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp [mapFinIdx_length, List.length_set, v.2]
      · intro i _ _
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : i = idx
        · subst h; simp
        · simp [h]; rw [mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx <;> simp [h, mapFinIdx_get]

induction n generalizing v with
      | zero => exact idx.elim0
      | succ n IH =>
        rcases v with ⟨_ | ⟨hd, tl⟩, hlen⟩
        · contradiction
        · apply Subtype.eq
          simp only [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx, List.mapFinIdx_cons]
          dsimp
          cases idx using Fin.cases with
          | zero => simp [List.set]
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.set]
            congr 1
            exact congr_arg Subtype.val (IH (v := ⟨tl, Nat.succ.inj hlen⟩) (idx := i) (f := fun j x h => f (j + 1) x (Nat.succ_lt_succ h)))

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [h, mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp [mapFinIdx_get]
      · simp [mapFinIdx_get, h]

ext i
      simp only [Vector.get_set, mapFinIdx_get]
      split_ifs <;> rfl

ext i
      simp only [Vector.get_mapFinIdx, Vector.get_set]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h; rfl
      · rfl

rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => exact idx.elim0
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        cases idx using Fin.cases with
        | zero => simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons]
        | succ i =>
          simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons]
          cases ih (v := ⟨tl, rfl⟩)
          rfl

ext i
      simp [mapFinIdx_get, Vector.get_set]
      split_ifs <;> rfl

induction n with
      | zero => exact idx.elim0
      | succ n IH =>
        rcases v using Vector.casesOn with ⟨hd, tl⟩
        cases idx using Fin.cases with
        | zero => simp [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx, List.set, List.mapFinIdx]
        | succ i =>
          simp [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx, List.set, List.mapFinIdx]
          apply IH

apply Subtype.eq
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp only [List.length_mapFinIdx, List.length_set, v.2]
      · intro i h1 h2
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        by_cases h : idx.1 = i
        · rw [← h]
          simp only [List.get_set_eq, List.getElem_set_eq]
          rfl
        · simp only [List.get_set_ne _ _ _ h, List.getElem_set_ne _ _ _ h]
          rw [mapFinIdx_get]

ext i
      simp only [Vector.get_mapFinIdx, Vector.get_set]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h; rfl
      · rfl

apply Vector.eq
      dsimp only [Vector.set, Vector.mapFinIdx]
      apply List.ext_get
      · simp only [mapFinIdx_length, List.length_set]
      · intro i h1 h2
        rw [mapFinIdx_get]
        have hlen : v.1.length = n := v.2
        by_cases h : i = idx.1
        · subst h
          rw [List.get_set_eq]
          · rw [List.get_set_eq]
            · simp
            · simp [hlen]
          · simp [mapFinIdx_length, hlen]
        · rw [List.get_set_ne]
          · rw [List.get_set_ne]
            · rw [mapFinIdx_get]; rfl
            · simp [h, hlen]
          · simp [h, mapFinIdx_length, hlen]
